---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Verity doesn't support today? Describe the use
case, not just the solution — context helps us find the right design.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches the comparison method (preprocessing,
registration, scoring, calibration), note that method changes are subject to
the validation policy in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md): anything
that moves a published number must update `docs/headline-numbers.md`.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've tried or ruled out.

## Scope

- **Component(s)**: (codec / bindings / engine / api / catalog / mcp / web / docs)
- Would you be willing to contribute a PR for this?

## Additional context

Links, papers, datasets, prior art.
